headline: Why Bonds Sold Off on the Surprisingly Strong Report
summary: The bond market was the real casualty of Friday's unusually strong economic data. Stocks made modest moves, but Treasuries saw a sharp selloff after the BLS said the unemployment rate in March fell from the prior month, while the U.
